steps.title: Identify the key contrast: what shows a decline?
steps.content: The researcher claims that lakes have seen a decline in ice duration between 1980-81 and 2005-06. A typical example must demonstrate exactly this: fewer ice days in 2005-06 than in 1980-81.

steps.title: Apply the decline pattern to the choices
steps.content:
Oulujarvi demonstrates the decline pattern—the graph shows more ice days in 1980-81 and fewer in 2005-06, directly supporting the researcher's claim.

The other three choices either address only one time period without showing the comparison (A, D) or show the opposite trend of an increase (B).

This matches choice C — C is correct.
